name: Flag
description: Flag schema from Amplitude Experiment Management API

id.description: The unique identifier for the flag.

projectId.description: The project ID the flag belongs to.

key.description: The unique key used to reference the flag in code.

name.description: The display name of the flag.

description.description: A description of the flag's purpose.

evaluationMode.description: The evaluation mode, either local or remote.

bucketingKey.description: The property used for bucketing users into variants.

bucketingSalt.description: The salt used for hashing during bucketing.

key.description: The unique key for the variant.

name.description: The display name of the variant.

payload.description: An optional JSON payload associated with the variant.

description.description: A description of what this variant does.

rolloutWeight.description: The rollout weight as a percentage (0-100) controlling traffic allocation to this variant.

deployments.description: Array of deployment IDs the flag is deployed to.

name.description: The display name of the segment.

conditions.description: Array of targeting conditions that define this segment.

variant.description: The variant key to assign when this segment matches.

percentage.description: The percentage of matching users to include (0-100).

state.description: The current state of the flag.
